testcase.name: test_par_levels_returns_rows

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected ≥7 par levels, got 1 assert 1 >= 7 + where 1 = len([{'description': 'Test Item', 'on_hand': 3.0, 'outlet': 'Test Outlet', 'pack_size': 1.0, ...}])

testcase.failure: tests/test_purchrec_sprint1_iter263.py:79: in test_par_levels_returns_rows assert len(data["rows"]) >= 7, f"Expected ≥7 par levels, got {len(data['rows'])}" E AssertionError: Expected ≥7 par levels, got 1 E assert 1 >= 7 E + where 1 = len([{'description': 'Test Item', 'on_hand': 3.0, 'outlet': 'Test Outlet', 'pack_size': 1.0, ...}])

testcase.name: test_deep_dive_refresh_triggers_fallback

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected 200, got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_purchrec_sprint1_iter263.py:200: in test_deep_dive_refresh_triggers_fallback assert r.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

failure.message:

testcase.name: test_server_health
